summary_text: **Findings** 1. **Medium**: Acceptance criteria can pass even if verification coverage regresses (checks removed/skipped). Current criteria require exit `0` and “all checks passed,” but do not pin the expected check set/count. If `sim-kernel-peripherals.sh` is changed to run fewer checks, this document would still consider it compliant. Reference: [requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:87](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:87) 2. **Medium**: Scope is narrower than the actual Kernel peripheral contract surface. The packet scopes dependency repair only to `cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy` subtrees, while Kernel verification explicitly includes linked-system adapters (including Cursorvers LINE side) via the same harness. This can misclassify non-Workers adapter failures as out-of-scope noise. References: [requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:34](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:34), [local-linked-systems.md:34](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/local-linked-systems.md:34) 3. **Low**: Failure modes omit hard preflight failures enforced by the harness. `sim-kernel-peripherals.sh` fails fast on missing required commands/dirs (`jq`, `rg`, `npm`, `deno`, dependent repo roots). These are operationally common and should be in failure-mode taxonomy; otherwise triage guidance is incomplete. References: [requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:67](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:67), [sim-kernel-peripherals.sh:70](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/sim-kernel-peripherals.sh:70) 4. **Low**: Stop conditions do not explicitly forbid “green by suppression.” There is no stop condition for edits that bypass/disable failing checks instead of fixing dependencies, which conflicts with sovereign/peripheral contract intent that verification harness remains meaningful. References: [requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:95](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-kernel-peripheral-verification.md:95), [kernel-sovereign-adapter-contract.md:172](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-sovereign-adapter-contract.md:172)
